prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大 学排名2026年约第84名，近年排名稳定在75–84区间，属于中上水平211；该校近年未出现在明显负面声誉或投档异常信号中，抖音热度数据中未进入前100名， 整体曝光度一般，无显著舆情干扰；电气工程学科评估A（全国前列），动力工程及工程热物理A-，电力行业特色鲜明，在能源电力领域具有极高认可度，对相 关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化专业在2024年专业热度分析中被评为"高热推荐"，社会关注度持续升温；本省2026年高考总报名人数约15 .4万人，按近年物理类占比约72%估算，2026年物理类考生约11.1万人，较2025年8.37万人增加约32%，竞争显著加剧；该校位于北京，对内蒙古考生有较强地域吸引力；本校在内蒙古招生占比约1.3%–1.4%，属非本省招生高校中的正常水平。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 6539 → 10084 → 6565 → 11500 → 7014, showing a pattern of drastic fluctuations. In 2022, due to a decrease in the provincial control line, the ranking significantly dropped to 10084, then quickly rebounded to 6565 in 2023, dropped again to 11500 in 2024, and rose to 7014 in 2025. The fluctuations in the past two years have been large, with a baseline of about 7014 in 2025. The enrollment plan for Physics Category (including Science) in this province was 68 students from 2021 to 2024, increased to 69 in 2025, and is planned to be 71 in 2026, a slight expansion of about 2.9% compared to 2025, which slightly alleviates competition but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 84th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 75–84 range in recent years, placing it at an upper-middle level among 211 universities. The university has not shown significant negative reputation or abnormal admission signals in recent years. It did not enter the top 100 in Douyin popularity data, indicating generally low exposure and no significant public opinion interference. Its Electrical Engineering discipline is rated A (top in the country), and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics is rated A-, with distinctive characteristics in the electric power industry, enjoying high recognition in the energy and power field, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Electrical Engineering and Automation major was rated as 'highly popular and recommended' in the 2024 major popularity analysis, with continuously increasing social attention. The total number of candidates for the 2026 college entrance examination in this province is about 154,000. Based on the recent proportion of Physics Category candidates at about 72%, it is estimated that there will be about 111,000 Physics Category candidates in 2026, an increase of about 32% compared to 83,700 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. The university is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional attraction for Inner Mongolia candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Inner Mongolia is about 1.3%–1.4%, which is normal among universities not primarily enrolling in this province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as drastic fluctuations in historical rankings, a slight 2.9% expansion in the 2026 plan, and a significant 32% increase in the number of Physics Category candidates in this province, the mitigating effect of expansion on competition is offset by the increase in candidate numbers. It is expected that competition will slightly intensify in 2026. The predicted minimum ranking is about 7186, with a range of 6686–7686.

- Computer Science and Technology (Beijing Campus).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 6686–7686, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Electrical Engineering category) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 6600), you can focus on applying for A-level discipline majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (outside 7600), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors and ensure Tier 3 majors as a safety net.
